items.tooltip: Total size of your training script + compressed model weights, measured in bytes

items.text: Training completed in ≤ 600 seconds on 8×H100 SXM
items.tooltip: Wall-clock time from first step to last step, measured on 8x NVIDIA H100 SXM GPUs
Separate 600-second budget for evaluation — not shared with training time
All 3 random seeds must produce valid results — prevents cherry-picking

items.text: BPB beats current SOTA by ≥ 0.005 nats (for record track)
items.tooltip: Your 3-seed mean BPB must beat the current best by at least 0.005 to be a new record

items.text: submission.json included with val_bpb, seeds, artifact sizes
items.tooltip: JSON file with your val_bpb scores, seed results, and artifact sizes

items.text: Training logs included for all 3 seeds
items.tooltip: stdout/stderr logs from all 3 training runs for reproducibility verification

items.text: No network calls during training or eval
items.tooltip: No downloading models, data, or making API calls during train or eval time

legal.text: Any neural architecture (transformers, SSMs, hybrids, MoE)
Any activation function (LeakyReLU², GeGLU, SwiGLU, etc.)

legal.tooltip: Learning rate scheduling strategies are unrestricted
Exponential moving average and stochastic weight averaging are legal
Standard sliding window approach for evaluation

legal.text: Quantization (INT6, INT8, GPTQ) — calibration within training budget
legal.tooltip: Quantization allowed if calibration happens within the 600s training budget
Test-time training is legal if scoring is single-pass and probabilities are properly normalized

banned.text: Hashed n-gram caches (improper normalization over vocab)
banned.tooltip: Banned March 27 — n-gram caches don't properly normalize probability distributions over the full vocabulary

banned.text: Two-pass rescoring (eval tokens leaked between passes)
banned.tooltip: Banned March 27 — information from first eval pass leaks into second pass

banned.text: GPTQ calibration on eval tokens (must fit in training 600s)
banned.tooltip: Banned March 22 — calibration on evaluation data is not allowed; must happen during training

banned.text: Pre-filling cache from training data at eval time
banned.tooltip: Banned March 27 — loading training-derived caches during evaluation is not permitted

banned.text: Multi-epoch TTT scoring same tokens twice
banned.tooltip: Banned — test-time training must not score the same tokens in multiple passes
Banned — using results from one scoring pass to select strategy for another is not allowed

grey_area.tooltip: May be legal if probability normalization is correct — under review

grey_area.text: Score-first TTT with complex mixing (depends on normalization)
grey_area.tooltip: Legality depends on whether the mixing preserves proper probability normalization
